title: Files, Directories, Links, and Metadata · Terminal Trace: Safe Globbing
summary: Prepare a service workspace while preserving names, metadata, link intent, and the ability to reverse every operation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the linux safe globbing increment in a reversible filesystem-change plan and evidence tree. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preview wildcard expansion and protect leading-hyphen, whitespace, newline, empty-match, and hidden-name cases.
Interpret size, allocation, ownership, mode, inode, timestamps, and link count with stat and ls evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.

content.code:
set -o noglob
printf 'target=%q\n' "reports/run-2.txt"
mkdir -p -- reports
touch -- "reports/run-2.txt"
stat -- "reports/run-2.txt"
